mapper.sql: id, user_id, disease_name, diagnosis_date, status, hospital_name, doctor_name, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_medical_history WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM user_medical_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY diagnosis_date DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_medical_history (user_id, disease_name, diagnosis_date, status, hospital_name, doctor_name, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{diseaseName}, #{diagnosisDate}, #{status}, #{hospitalName}, #{doctorName}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_medical_history
disease_name = #{diseaseName},
diagnosis_date = #{diagnosisDate},
status = #{status},
hospital_name = #{hospitalName},
doctor_name = #{doctorName},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
